name: Dr. K.M. Mohibul Kabir
about: Dr. K. M. Mohibul Kabir joined East Delta University (EDU) as an Associate Professor in the School of Science, Engineering & Technology in September 2022. Previously, he worked as an Assistant Professor in the same school at EDU. He also worked as an Australian Research Council DECRA - Research Fellow and Postdoctoral Fellow in the School of Chemistry, University of New South Wales (UNSW), Sydney, Australia. Dr. Kabir completed his PhD from Center for Advanced Materials & Industrial Chemistry, Department of Applied Chemistry, School of Applied Sciences, RMIT University, Melbourne, Australia, with specialization in micro- and nanoscale acoustic wave gas sensors. He completed his Master of Science and Bachelor of Science (Hons.) in Electrical & Electronic Engineering from Islamic University Technology (IUT), Gazipur, Bangladesh. Dr. Kabir’s current research focus is on acoustic wave-based sensor and high electric field-spectrometer development for important applications such as disease diagnosis, proteomics, forensics, and environmental monitoring. To date, he has published 35 peer-reviewed journal articles in Scopus-indexed journals.

name: Dr. Ishtiaque Aziz Zahed
about: Md. Ishtiaque Aziz Zahed is currently an Associate Professor with the School of Science, Engineering and Technology East Delta University (EDU), Bangladesh. He received the B.Sc. and M.Sc. degrees in electrical and electronic engineering from the Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET), in 2011 and 2015, respectively. Thereafter he achieved his PhD degree from the Edith Cowan University, Australia, in 2020. Previously, he served as Associate Dean of school of Science, Engineering and Technology (SoSET), Additional Director, Institute of Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC); Coordinator, M.Sc. in CSE and M.Sc. in ETE; Coordinator, Regular Undergraduate Programs (SoSET), and Exam Coordinator. His research interests include the IoT, Mobile Edge Computing, UAV-assisted Networks, Underwater Communications, Network Security, Green Communications, Network Function Virtualization.

name: Mr. Golam Moktader Daiyan
about: Since 2013, my role has been that of an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at East Delta University. With a wealth of over fifteen years in teaching Computer Science and Engineering, my expertise encompasses diverse areas, such as Artificial Intelligence, Image Processing, Pattern Recognition, and Deep Learning. I hold a Bachelor of Engineering degree from Madurai Kamaraj University, India, and a M.Sc. (Engg) degree from Islamic University of Technology, Bangladesh. Currently, I am pursuing a Ph.D. In the past, from 2005 to 2012, I served as a faculty member and Head of the Department of Computer Science and Information Technology at Southern University Bangladesh. Throughout my academic journey, I have effectively supervised numerous projects and thesis for both undergraduate and master's degree students.

name: Md Samiul Alam
about: As a faculty member at East Delta University, I have conducted undergraduate courses through laboratory and class lecture, question preparation, assignment or any project paper evaluation, supervising undergraduate research groups, New student admission processing, examination duty, invigilation, scrutinizing, tabulation etc. Major Courses Conducted:- 1) Digital Electronics 2) Electronics-II 3) Electrical Properties of Materials 4) Renewable energy technology 5) Power Electronics During my tenure as a coordinator, my major tasks included- Curriculum Development, Student Support , Scheduling and Registration , Faculty Coordination, Event Coordination, Advisory Role and etc. Previously, I have served at the University of Science & Technology Chittagong, Chittagong. I have been awarded “Magna cum laude” from American International University- Bangladesh, (AIUB) for academic excellence in undergraduate degree and a scholarship (up to 60%) for academic Excellence.

name: Dr. Mohammad Mahbubur Rahman
about: Dr. Mohammad Mahbubur Rahman is currently working as an Assistant professor in School of Science, Engineering and technology at East Delta University (EDU), Bangladesh. He is also working as a member of IQAC and External Engagement committee at East Delta University. He received his Ph.D. degree from Queensland University of Technology (Q.U.T.) in 2018. He has earned a good reputation in Physics-based modeling and simulation, Biomedical image processing, and renewable energy through his scholarly, innovative, high-quality research. Dr. Rahman has authored over 38 peer-reviewed articles, including high-quality (Q1) journal papers, peer-reviewed book chapters, and conference papers. His papers have attracted about 1500+ citations with h-index 12 and i10 index 13. He was a member of the team which developed internationally recognized real-world project-based learning (P.B.L.) programs for undergraduate and postgraduate students. This program has made Q.U.T. a world leader in technical education. Dr. Rahman also has experience in Outcome-Based Learning (O.B.E.) and the Blended learning process. He has been a keynote/distinguished speaker at scores of international conferences and invited/keynote speaker in seminars in many reputed universities worldwide. His current research is directed towards mathematical modeling, renewable energy, embedded system engineering, and the Internet of things (IoT). Dr. Rahman also has more than ten years of extensive industry experience in the different sectors, including Healthcare (QLD-Australia), Local government (Australia), aviation, and telecommunication and information technology. He has a reputable, proven track record in deploying and managing cutting-edge Internet of things (IoT) systems, including wireless networks (R.F., LTE, 5G-open RAN) and, smart city systems.

name: Kazi Ekramul Hoque
about: Kazi Ekramul Hoque is currently assistant professor with the School of Science, Engineering and Technology East Delta University (EDU), Bangladesh. He received the B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET), in 2015 and M.S. in Computer Science from King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals, Dhahran, KSA. His research interests include the Machine Learning, Data Science, Time Series Forecasting, Cyber-Security and Empirical Software Engineering.

name: Arifa Sultana Zarna
about: Arifa Sultana joined the department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at East Delta University as a Lecturer in 2019. Because of her dedication to academic teaching, research, and leadership roles, she was promoted as Assistant Professor of Computer Science and Engineering department in 2022. Considering her commitment to excellence, teamwork, and continuous improvement, she was appointed as program coordinator of regular engineering program of CSE department. She also has a participatory role in different academic and administrative committees. Prior to joining at East Delta University, Ms. Arifa worked as a lecturer in the department of Computer Science and Engineering at Bangladesh Army International University of Science and Technology (BAIUST) located in Cumilla. Ms. Arifa has proven records in Academic research by publishing notable numbers of articles in top international journals and conferences.

name: Nahida Nigar
about: Ms. Nahida Nigar is currently an Assistant Professor at the School of Science Engineering & Technology, East Delta University. She holds both a B.Sc. (Engg.) and M.Sc. (Engg.) from the University of Chittagong. Ms. Nigar is a dedicated educator, known for her ability to implement effective pedagogical strategies, create inclusive learning environments, and adapt her teaching methods to suit diverse learning needs. Beyond her teaching role, Ms. Nahida Nigar is an enthusiastic researcher, delving into the realms of cyber security, explainable AI, machine learning, artificial intelligence, computer networks, wireless communication, web development and Internet technology.

name: Mr. Imtiaz Akber Chowdhury
about: Imtiaz Akber Chowdhury joined East Delta University (EDU) as an Assistant Professor in the School of Science, Engineering and Technology (SoSET) in September 2025. Previously, he worked as an Assistant Professor of the Department of EEE at USTC, Chattogram, Bangladesh. Imtiaz received the B.Sc. degree in Electronic and Telecommunication Engineering from International Islamic University Chittagong, Bangladesh in 2014 and M.Sc. degree in Electronic Engineering from Kyung Hee University, Yongin, South Korea in 2020. During his post-graduation, he worked as a Research Assistant in Electronic department at Kyung Hee University where he was involved in several projects related to UAV-assisted communication. His research interest includes unmanned aerial vehicle assisted communication, mm-Wave antenna design for 5G communication, and the Internet of things. Imtiaz has published numerous articles in reputable journals and conferences, sharing his insights on topics ranging from wireless communication to antenna design for 5G technology.

name: Mr. Tanvir Azhar
about: Tanvir Azhar is a highly skilled faculty member in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) at East Delta University. He is an alumnus of Royal Melbourne Institute of Technology (RMIT), Australia and has achieved notable milestones in his academic and professional endeavours. He is also a member of Australian Computer Society (ACS). Professional Skills: • Programming Languages: Python, C/C++, Assembly, JavaScript (React.JS, Next.JS, SCSS, Chakra UI), Kotlin, Swift, GraphQL • AI/ML Tools: TensorFlow, Scikit‐Learn, PyTorch, OpenAI-Gym • Software: AWS Cloud, GCP Cloud, Android Studio, Xcode, Windows Server 2012, WireShark, Neo4j Administration Platform, VMware Clustering Products, Weka, JIRA, GitHub, LaTeX, MS Office • Soft Skills: Agile Practices (Scrum), Project Management, Presentation, Technical Documentation, Report Writing Certifications: • Neo4j Certified Professional Certification Id – 16847423 (Score – 91.4%) Neo4j Inc. USA • Neo4j Administration Certification Id – 72622371 Neo4j Inc. USA • VMware Data Center Modernization VMWare LLC, Palo Alto, California, USA • Microcontroller Course Planeter, Bangladesh

name: Mr. Kazi Muhammad Asif Ashrafi
about: Kazi Muhammad Asif Ashrafi is a dedicated lecturer at the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) within the School of Science and Engineering Technology (SoSET). He began his academic journey at this institution on May 12, 2018. As an accomplished scholar, he holds a Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) degree from BUET, which he successfully completed in 2017. Currently, he is pursuing his Master of Science (M.Sc.) at BUET, showcasing his commitment to furthering his education.

name: Ms. Saraf Anika
about: Ms. Saraf is currently working as an Assisstant Professor in Computer Science and Engineering at East Delta University. Previously she has served at many profound organisations. She has worked at the Abul Khair Group as an IT Engineer. Also she has served as a Software Engineer/Team Leader at Smart Framework. She has done her M Sc. in Information Systems from the Norwegian University of Science and Technology(NTNU) and her B Sc. in CSE from Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology(CUET).

name: Mr. Mashky Chowdhury Surja
about: Mr. Mashky is an accomplished professional with a strong academic background, holding an MSc in Mathematics of Networks, an MSc in Mathematics, and a BSc in Electronics and Communication Engineering. With expertise in mathematics, he has made significant contributions as a Lecturer at East Delta University and previously as a Senior Mathematics Teacher at various High Schools. He has a passion for education and a dedication to excellence. As a researcher, he has worked on projects related to urban street networks and antennas. They have received recognition for their academic achievements, including the School of Mathematical Sciences Bursary. Fluent in Bangla and English, Mr. Mashky brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to his work. He is proficient in various programs and programming languages. With a commitment to education and a passion for teaching, he is poised to make a significant impact in his field.

name: Mr. S.M. Baque Billah
about: S.M. Baque Billah is a lecturer in the Department of Electrical & Electronic Engineering (EEE) at East Delta University in Chittagong, Bangladesh. He is actively involved in research and academic activities in the field of electrical and electronic engineering. Some of his research work includes models of wind turbines and sustainable energy systems based on solar energy, which aim to address utility challenges in urban areas of Bangladesh. He has also contributed to the development of MATLAB simulink models for analyzing the impact of inlet height on speed ratio in the context of Invelox, a wind energy technology.

name: Mr. Ahamed- Al- Arifin
about: Ahamed- Al- Arifin has joined the department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at East Delta University as a lecturer in 2021. Prior to that, he worked as a lecturer in EEE department at World University of Bangladesh and before that he worked as a guest lecturer at Dhaka International University (DIU).

name: Muhammad Asif Hasan
about: Muhammad Asif Hasan is a committed lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at East Delta University. Before this role, he served for nearly three years as a Graduate Research Assistant in multiple research labs at the University of Malaya. Additionally, he is actively engaged in research and academic pursuits within the domains of deep learning and computer vision across various sectors.

name: Mr. Joydwip Mohajon
about: Joydwip Mohajon is a Lecturer in the School of Science, Engineering and Technology at East Delta University. He completed his Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Khulna University. His research interest includes Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Optimization, etc.

name: Ms. Sharmin Akter
about: Ms Sharmin is currently serving as a lecturer in the School of Science, Engineering & Technology at East Delta University. She is playing a dynamic role in two major Engineering departments at EDU where she is taking the following courses- Department of Computer Science and Engineering ● PHY 101: Physics. ● PHY 102: Physics Lab. ● MATH 207: MATH-II-Integral Calculus, Vector Analysis & Linear Algebra ● MATH 301: MATH-V-Probability & Statistics Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering ● PHY 101: Physics. ● PHY 102: Physics Lab. ● EEE 307: Science of Materials. ● MATH 101: Differential Calculus and Integral Calculus . ● MATH 207: MATH-II-Integral Calculus, Vector Analysis & Linear Algebra. ● MATH 301: MATH-V-Probability & Statistics. She has set a milestone by receiving National Science and Technology (NST) fellowship 2015-16 Government of the People’s Republic of Bangladesh.

name: Sultan Mahmud
about: Sultan is an exceptionally talented faculty at the department of EEE at East Delta University. He has graduated from Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology (BUET) and has made prominent accomplishments in his field! During his years at BUET he has made significant accomplishments! Awards and Honors- University Merit Scholarship – BUET (2017, 2019, 2020) Dean’s List Award – BUET (2017‐2022) Dr. Saifuddin Ahmed Chowdhury Memorial Scholarship – BUET (2021‐2022) University Technical Scholarship – BUET (2017‐2022) Bronze Award – HRH The Duke of Edinburgh KG KT Founder He has mastered excellence in- Programming Languages: Python, Verilog, Assembly, C/C++ AI/ML Tools: Tensorflow, Scikit‐Learn Software: Matlab, Simulink, Cadence Virtuoso, Proteus, OrCAD, Spice Circuit Simulator, NI Multisim, Intel® Quartus, Emu8086, CodeBlocks, STM32Cube IDE, Arduino IDE, EAGLE, AutoCAD, LaTeX, MS Office Hardware: Microcontroller, Arduino, FPGA, PLC, Embedded Circuit Design, PCB Design Soft Skills: Presentation, Technical Drawing, Project and Event Management, Report Writing

name: Mr. Md. Sabbir Al Ahsan
about: Md. Sabbir Al Ahsan is a Lecturer in the Department of CSE at the School of Science Engineering & Technology at East Delta University. He has completed his B.Sc in Computer Science & Engineering from Chittagong University Of Engineering & Technology (CUET). He is currently serving as the Assistant Coordinator of school of Science, Engineering and Technology (SoSET), EDU.

name: Sayeda Suaiba Anwar
about: Ms. Sayeda Suaiba Anwar joined the department of Computer Science and Engineering at East Delta University as a Lecturer in September, 2021. She has completed her B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET). Recently, she has been promoted to Assistant Professor in the same department. She served as the Faculty Advisor at EDU Debating Society. Also, she is an active member of Women Empowerment and Leadership Fund (WELF) at EDU.

name: Ms. Tasnimatul Jannah
about: Ms. Tasnimatul has completed her BSc in CSE from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET) and joined EDU in September 2022. She passionately holds to the belief that education is not a one-size-fits-all discipline hence each student's individual learning needs should be taken into account. She prefers interactive teaching where students can learn via active participation. In this dynamic interchange, students not only learn from her, but she also obtains insightful information from the students. Previously, she has been working as a Software QA Engineer at Enosis Solutions which allows her to incorporate her industrial experience and knowledge into her teaching.

name: Ms. Parna Mutsuddy
about: Ms. Parna is currently working as a Lecturer at East Delta University since October 2022. She started her carrier as an Adjunct Faculty at Chittagong Independent University from January, 2019. Then she worked as a lecturer at Bangladesh Army International University of Science and Technology since September 2019 to September 2022. Her research interest include language teaching and pedagogy, language technology. She is an active member of BELTA Chittagong South.

name: Mr. Md. Jahidul Hasan Jahid
about: Mr. Jahid is currently working as a Lecturer at East Delta Unviersity. He has completed his B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology (CUET). He is currently enrolled in the M.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering program at Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology (CUET). His research interest includes - Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision. You can connect with him through this e-mail.

name: Mr. Md. Jamil Uddin
about: Md. Jamil Uddin embarked on his academic journey at East Delta University on May 16, 2023, as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. He completed his B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from the Department of CSE at Rajshahi University of Engineering and Technology (RUET). His educational foundation was built upon solid academic achievements, having completed both his Higher Secondary Certificate (H.S.C) and Secondary School Certificate (S.S.C) studies at Faujdarhat Cadet College. Mr. Uddin's passion lies at the intersection of cutting-edge technology and its applications. His research interests prominently include the fields of Deep Learning, Machine Learning and Medical Image Analysis, demonstrating a keen desire to address real-world challenges through innovative computational approaches.

name: Ms. Nishat Soultana Chy
about: Ms. Nishat is currently serving East Delta University as a lecturer in the department of Computer Science and Engineering. She has her expertise in various sections of her field. Previously, she has also served as a Lecturer at the Cox’s Bazar International University. Her research interests include Chemoinformatics, Bioinformatics, Machine Learning and Data Science.

name: Mr. Md. Rakibul Islam
about: Md. Rakibul Islam is a lecturer with the School of Science, Engineering and Technology at East Delta University (EDU), Bangladesh, currently on study leave. Md. Rakibul Islam received the B.Sc. (Engg.) degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) from the Shahjalal University of Science and Technology (SUST), Bangladesh, in 2021. Thereafter he worked as a Research Assistant in a research project with Institute of Advanced Research (IAR), UIU and Office of Research-NSU. His research interests include wireless communication, wireless sensor network, cellular communication, signal processing, and machine learning.

name: Ms. Arshiana Shamir
about: Arshiana Shamir joined East Delta University (EDU) in September 2022 as a Lecturer in the School of Science, Engineering and Technology. She earned her Master of Engineering in Information and Communication Engineering from Chosun University, Gwangju, South Korea, and her Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering from the University of Chittagong, Chattogram, Bangladesh.

name: Mr. Tahsin Mahmud
about: Tahsin Mahmud, an esteemed member of our academic community, joined East Delta University on May 16, 2023. As a dedicated Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, within the School of Science, Engineering & Technology. He earned his Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Khulna University of Engineering & Technology (KUET). During his academic journey, he was awarded with the Deans Award in BSc. 3rd year! His primary research interests lie at the intersection of Image Processing and Computer Vision. With ongoing projects in these domains, he continues to contribute significantly to the advancement of knowledge in the field.

name: Mr. Md. Siratul Mustakim Ifty
about: Thank you for viewing my profile. I began my tenure as a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at East Delta University on September 17, 2023. Currently, I am pursuing my Master of Science degree in EEE from Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology. I completed my Bachelor of Science degree in EEE from Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology on May 27, 2023. My research interests revolve around nanomaterials, valleytronics, and spintronics. I primarily utilize DFT-based frameworks to investigate the intriguing properties of monolayer materials. For inquiries or correspondence, please feel free to email me at siratul.m@eastdelta.edu.bd.

name: Mr. Sourav Adhikary
about: Sourav Adhikary is a Lecturer in the Department of CSE at the School of Science Engineering & Technology at East Delta University. He has completed his B.Sc in Computer Science & Engineering from Chittagong University Of Engineering & Technology (CUET) and has his M.Sc ongoing in Computer Science & Engineering from Chittagong University Of Engineering & Technology (CUET). name: Mr. Saklain Abdullah
about: Saklain Abdullah, a distinguished member of our faculty, joined East Delta University as a Lecturer in January 2024. He earned his BSc. (Engg.) degree from the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology and currently pursuing MSc. (Engg.) from the same institution. He has served as a Software Engineer (Remote) with a global team at Bevy Commerce Inc. in Toronto, Canada. In this role, he not only showcased his technical prowess but also engaged in fruitful collaborations with professionals on an international scale. His research interests include Large Language Models, Bengali Audio and Text Processing, Generative Pretrained Transformers, Bidirectional Transformer Architecture and Recurrent Neural Networks.

name: Nasehatul Mustakim Nabila
about: I have completed my bachelor's from CUET. After graduation, I started my career in academia as a lecturer. I prefer interactive teaching where students can learn through active participation, and I am always enthusiastic to inspire and guide the next generation of innovative minds.

name: Engr. Md. Jibon Mia
about: I had joined East Delta University as a SoSET faculty member on September 16, 2023. I completed my BSc Eng. in Computer Science and Engineering from Khulna University of Engineering & Technology (KUET) and currently pursuing an MSc Eng. in Computer Science and Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology (CUET). I was awarded with Dean’s Award for excellent academic results at KUET where I gained industry-compatible tech skills and professional certifications related to programming, network and system administration, data science, automation, cybersecurity and Linux. I believe my skills will benefit students to become industry-compatible engineers. Major Competencies: 1. C, C++, Python, ASP, PHP, Java, Swift, PL/SQL, HTML-CSS-JavaScript-Bootstrap. 2. Enterprise wired & wireless network design, deployment, monitoring and troubleshooting. Site-to-site & IPSec VPN, QoS and MPLS deployment. 3. SDN, ASA & Palo Alto Firewall, Active Directory & Windows Server Administration. 4. Automation (Ansible), virtualization, REST API, bash scripting and DBMS. 5. Linux administration, pen-testing, git, docker, Jira, SolarWinds, Office 365 and Google Workspace. 6. Simulation with Packet Tracer, GNS3, NS3 and Wireshark. 7. App development with Android Studio, Xcode, Wix, WordPress, XAMPP and Visual Studio. 8. Data science libraries like NumPy, Pandas, Keras, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, Matplotlib, etc. LinkedIn Profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/engr-jibon-m/

name: Mr. Mohammed Morshed Rana
about: I am a lecturer at East Delta University with a background in Computer Science & Engineering. I hold both an M.S. and B.Sc. in this field from the University of Chittagong. My focus is on helping students understand and excel in Computer Science through practical and engaging teaching methods.

name: Mr. Sanath Kumar Das
about: Sanath Kumar Das is a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at East Delta University, a role he has held since May 18, 2024. He is currently pursuing a Master of Science in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at the Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET), where he also earned his Bachelor of Science in the same field on May 27, 2023. Sanath’s research interests lie in cutting-edge areas such as multi-robot systems, biomedical signal processing, and brain-computer interfaces. For inquiries or collaboration opportunities, he can be reached at sanath.k@eastdelta.edu.bd.

name: Shadika Afroze
about: I am Shadika Afroze, currently working as a Lecturer at East Delta University. I completed my Bachelor's degree with Honors in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology. Currently, I am pursuing my Master’s degree at the same institution. As a lecturer, I am passionate about sharing knowledge and inspiring the next generation of innovators.

name: Ms. Arpita Chakraborty
about: To keep myself involved in the fields related to Computer Science and Engineering so that I can implement my educational and technical skills. Being able to work on my own initiative and as part of a team, I always think about new heights and have a quest for a positive and bigger outlook to “Make The Difference”. Currently I am working as a Lecturer at the School of Science Engineering & Technology (SoSET), East Delta University. Previously I served as a Lecturer in CSE at Southern University Bangladesh for more than 3 years. My research focuses on the integration of Machine Learning and Deep Learning.

name: Ms. Shahin Akter
about: I am currently a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at East Delta University, a position I have held since May 25, 2024. I am also a postgraduate student at CUET, pursuing my M.Sc. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering. I earned my B.Sc. from CUET in August 2022 and served as a faculty member at Southern University Bangladesh between 2023 and 2024. My academic involvement includes supervising undergraduate thesis and projects in core areas of electronics and signal processing. My research focuses on the integration of Artificial Intelligence in communication systems, design and application of modern electronic devices, signal processing in biomedical field. For inquiries or collaboration opportunities, reach me at shahin.akter@eastdelta.edu.bd.

name: Mr. Abid Hossain
about: Abid Hossain joined East Delta University in May 2025 as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering under the School of Science, Engineering, and Technology. He completed his B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET) and is currently enrolled in the M.Sc. in the same field. His research interests include Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Computer Vision, with applications in healthcare analytics and information security.

name: Mr. Asif Noor Jamee
about: Asif Noor Jamee is a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at East Delta University, Chattogram, Bangladesh. He is currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET), after completing his Bachelor’s degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at Khulna University of Engineering and Technology (KUET). Previously, Asif served as a Lecturer at the Military Institute of Science and Technology (MIST) at the Bangladesh Military Academy (BMA) Campus, Chattogram, where he taught undergraduate courses in Electrical Circuit, Digital Electronics, and Electrical Machines, along with sessional courses in various laboratory settings. His research interests include Perovskite Solar Cells, Semiconductor Material Optimization, and Advanced Renewable Energy Systems. Asif’s research work focuses on optimizing Perovskite Solar Cells and analyzing the performance of Non-Line of Sight communication techniques. He has received the Dean’s Award twice for academic excellence during his undergraduate studies and has actively participated in extracurricular activities, enhancing his leadership and communication skills. Asif is proficient in technical tools such as MATLAB, PSpice, SCAPS, and Microwind, which support his academic and research pursuits.

name: Mr. Riad Hossain
about: I have joined East Delta University in October 2024 as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering under the School of Science, Engineering, and Technology. I completed my B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET), where I am currently pursuing my M.Sc. in the same field. My research primarily focuses on Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing and Data-Driven Modeling, with applications in healthcare analytics, speech processing, and social computing. I am particularly interested in developing trustworthy AI systems that combine interpretability, optimization, and multimodal data integration to solve real-world challenges.

name: Mr. A. S. M. Junayet Hossain
about: A. S. M. Junayet Hossain joined East Delta University (EDU) as a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical & Electronic Engineering under the School of Science, Engineering & Technology (SoSET) in September 2025. Before joining EDU, he served as an Adjunct Lecturer in the Department of CSE at the International Islamic University Chattogram (IIUC). He earned his Bachelor of Science (B. Sc.) in Electrical & Electronic Engineering from Rajshahi University of Engineering & Technology (RUET), Bangladesh, and is currently pursuing a Master of Science (M. Sc.) in Electrical & Electronic Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology (CUET), Bangladesh. He has authored research articles published in peer-reviewed international journals. His research interests include power electronics, harmonic mitigation, renewable energy systems, electric vehicle power systems, embedded systems, and VLSI-based control applications.

name: Mr. Antu Chowdhury
about: Antu Chowdhury joined East Delta University in July, 2025 as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering. He is currently pursuing Master’s in Computer Science & Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology (CUET), His research interests lie primarily in the fields of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision, with a particular focus on multilingual sentiment analysis. His broader areas of interest include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Artificial Intelligence, particularly their applications in language understanding, image analysis, and intelligent systems.

name: Mr. Udoy Das
about: At East Delta University in Bangladesh, Udoy Das teaches computer science and engineering. He specializes in Natural Language Processing, Multimodal Learning, and Machine & Deep Learning, with a focus on Multilingual NLP, Large Language Models, and Text-to-Speech systems. He holds a B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering & Technology, graduating with honors. Udoy has received multiple awards, and has contributed to numerous international conferences and workshops. His work spans academic research, software development, and mentoring in advanced machine learning techniques.

name: Ms. Fareen Tasneem
about: Fareen Tasneem has been serving East Delta University as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering since July 2025. Prior to that, she worked as a Junior Instructor at the Asian University for Women in 2024. She completed her bachelor’s in Computer Science & Engineering from the University of Chittagong, where she is also pursuing her master's. Her research endeavors cover various themes in NLP, such as opinion mining, information extraction, multi-modal learning, and crisis informatics.

name: Mr. Ashrafur Rahman Chowdhury
about: Ashrafur Rahman Chowdhury joined East Delta University (EDU) as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering under the School of Science, Engineering & Technology in September 2025. He received his Bachelor of Science (Engg.) degree in Software Engineering from Shahjalal University of Science and Technology (SUST), Sylhet, Bangladesh. He is currently pursuing his Master of Science (Engg.) degree in Computer Science and Engineering at Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET), Chattogram, Bangladesh. His core strengths span problem-solving, object-oriented programming, data structures and algorithms, database management systems, machine learning, deep learning, design patterns, and software architecture. Prior to joining EDU, he served as an Adjunct Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at International Islamic University Chittagong (IIUC), Chattogram, Bangladesh. He also worked as a Software Engineer at Orbitax Bangladesh Limited, Dhaka, Bangladesh. His research interests include computer vision, large language models, deep learning, and autonomous systems.

name: Ms. Tahmina Akter Sumi
about: Tahmina Akter Sumi joined East Delta University in October 2024 as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. Prior to this, she served as a Lecturer at the University of Creative Technology Chittagong for three years. She completed both her Bachelor of Science (BSc) and Master of Science (MSc) in Computer Science and Engineering from the University of Chittagong. Her academic and research interests include Image Processing, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.

name: Mr. Saleh Sakib Ahmed
about: Saleh Sakib Ahmed completed his undergraduate studies at BUET. He subsequently worked in academia as a research assistant and later as an AI engineer at BUET before joining EDU as a faculty member. He has authored multiple peer-reviewed publications in reputable journals, with research interests spanning generative AI, remote sensing, computer vision, large language models (LLMs), and computational biology.

name: Jannatul Naima
about: Jannatul Naima joined East Delta University (EDU) as a Lecturer in the School of Science, Engineering & Technology in May 2025. Previously, she served as an Adjunct Lecturer at International Islamic University Chittagong (IIUC). Ms. Naima completed her Bachelor of Science in Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering from the University of Chittagong (CU), Chittagong, Bangladesh. Currently, she is pursuing her Masters in the same institution. Ms. Naima’s current research focus is on Natural Language Processing, semantic similarity, and transformer-based language models, with applications in contextual phrase retrieval and semantic search.

name: Mr. Md. Yeasin
about: Md. Yeasin is a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at East Delta University, Bangladesh. He completed his B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET). His academic and professional interests span computer networking, cybersecurity, network automation, machine learning, and blockchain-based systems. Prior to joining academia, he worked as a Junior Network & Cybersecurity Engineer at Poridhi.io and gained software engineering experience through internships in ASP.NET MVC development. He has developed projects in networking, artificial intelligence, blockchain, web development, and operating systems, including network automation tools, AI-powered applications, and blockchain-based agricultural supply chain solutions. Md. Yeasin holds several industry certifications, including CCNA, Cisco Network Defense, and Google’s Computer Networking and Cybersecurity certifications. He is passionate about conducting research and developing practical solutions that bridge the gap between academic innovation and real-world applications in networking and cybersecurity.

name: Ms. Ishraq Samiha
about: Ishraq Samiha joined East Delta University (EDU) in January 2026 as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering under the School of Science, Engineering and Technology. She earned her Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology (CUET), Chattogram, Bangladesh. Her current research focuses on blockchain security, cross-chain interactions, and privacy-preserving decentralized applications.
